briefdescription.para: Dumps debug information for the list of element node, it is recursive.
Check that a given namespace is in scope on a node.

simplesect.para: 1 if in scope, -1 in case of argument error, -2 if the namespace is not in scope, and -3 if not on an ancestor node.

briefdescription.para: Handle a debug error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlDebugCtxtPtr ctxt, int error, const char *msg, int extra)
memberdef.name: xmlDebugErr2

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlDebugCtxtPtr ctxt, int error, const char *msg, const char *extra)
memberdef.name: xmlDebugErr3

briefdescription.para: Report if a given namespace is is not in scope.
Do debugging on the string, currently it just checks the UTF-8 content.
Do debugging on the name, for example the dictionary status and conformance to the Name production.
Dumps debug information for the attribute.
Dumps debug information for the attribute list.
Dumps debug information for the element node, it is not recursive/.
Dumps debug information for the element node, it is recursive.
Dumps debug information concerning the document, not recursive.
Dumps debug information for the document, it's recursive.
Dumps debug information for all the entities in use by the document.
Dumps debug information for the DTD.
Dumps information about the string, shorten it if necessary.
Dumps debug information for the attribute.
Dumps debug information for all the entities in use by the document.
Dumps debug information for the attribute list.
Dumps debug information for the element node, it is not recursive.
Dumps debug information for the element node, it is recursive.
Dumps debug information for the list of element node, it is recursive.
Dumps debug information concerning the document, not recursive.
Dumps debug information for the document, it's recursive.
Dumps debug information for the DTD.
Check the document for potential content problems, and output the errors to output
